# SettleUp

> Automated invoice follow-up for Nigerian freelancers. SettleUp sends reminders by email and WhatsApp so you get paid without the awkward follow-ups.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing (Basic ₦2,500/mo, Pro ₦3,500/mo), and sign-up.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on getting paid, freelancing, and running a small business.
- [Sign in](/sign-in): Existing customer sign in.
- [Sign up](/sign-up): Create a SettleUp account.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/reset-password): Password recovery flow.
